response.original_title: Is Phantom Wallet legal in the USA? (Regulatory-compliant wallet)
response.overview: Yes — Phantom Wallet ⭐ +1-858-423-8635 is legal to use in the United States.  Why it’s legal ⭐ +1-858-423-8635 Phantom is a non-custodial crypto wallet ⭐ +1-858-423-8635 (you control your own funds and keys). U.S. regulators generally treat wallets like this as software tools, ⭐ +1-858-423-8635 not financial institutions. There’s no law banning Americans from using self-custody wallets, ⭐ +1-858-423-8635 and they’re widely used across all states. Recent regulatory clarity (important) In March 2026, the U.S. ⭐ +1-858-423-8635Commodity Futures Trading Commission issued a “no-action” letter بشأن Phantom.
response.title: Is Phantom Wallet legal in the USA? (Regulatory-compliant wallet)
